Getting Staking Power

Stake your Polyhedra Network Token and receive Staking Power in return. The amount of your Staking Power is directly proportional to both the amount of Polyhedra Network Token you stake and the remaining duration for which it is staked.

Please note that the amount of Staking Power will gradually decrease over time and will ultimately reach zero at the end of the lock period. At this point, your Polyhedra Network Token will be unlocked and you can choose to redeem them.
